United Pallets

About Us

A pallet partner built around continuity of supply and practical execution.

Established in 2019 and operating from Rawang, United Pallets combines manufacturing, recovery, delivery, and program support under one operating model.

Company Overview

Designed to support pallet-intensive operations with fewer handoffs.

United Pallets works with businesses that depend on pallet consistency, fast response, and practical cost control. By keeping design, manufacturing, recovery, and delivery closely aligned, the company is able to support customers with better continuity and clearer accountability.

Operations Scale

Daily service built on regional manufacturing and recovery capability.

  • Manufacturing and pallet distribution support for regular industrial demand.
  • Recovery routing and repair operations that extend pallet life and reduce waste.
  • Regional service points that support customers across Peninsular Malaysia.

Malaysia Network

Local service on a national scale.

With a broad operating footprint and multiple service points, United Pallets supports customers across Peninsular Malaysia while maintaining the responsiveness expected from a local partner.

Sustainability Commitment

Lifecycle thinking backed by operational discipline.
